description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push, pull request, and a scheduled cron job. The workflow should ignore changes to docs, .github/workflows/docs.yml, and markdown files. It should use a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, with custom settings for ubuntu-latest. The workflow should check out the code, modify apt sources and install dependencies on Linux, create a build directory, configure CMake, build the project, and run tests.
